chinese_text: 夫佳兵者，不祥之器，物或惡之，
translation_text: Now arms, however beautiful, are instruments of evil omen, hateful, it may be said, to all creatures.
translation_text_raw: Now arms, however beautiful, are instruments of evil omen, hateful, it may be said, to all creatures.

translation_text: Therefore they who have the Dao do not like to employ them.
translation_text_raw: Therefore they who have the Dao do not like to employ them.

chinese_text: 君子居則貴左，用兵則貴右。
translation_text: The superior man ordinarily considers the left hand the most honourable place, but in time of war the right hand.
translation_text_raw: The superior man ordinarily considers the left hand the most honourable place, but in time of war the right hand.

chinese_text: 兵者不祥之器，非君子之器，
translation_text: Those sharp weapons are instruments of evil omen, and not the instruments of the superior man;
translation_text_raw: Those sharp weapons are instruments of evil omen, and not the instruments of the superior man;

translation_text: - he uses them only on the compulsion of necessity.
translation_text_raw: - he uses them only on the compulsion of necessity.

translation_text: Calm and repose are what he prizes;
translation_text_raw: Calm and repose are what he prizes;

translation_text: victory (by force of arms) is to him undesirable.
translation_text_raw: victory (by force of arms) is to him undesirable.

translation_text: To consider this desirable would be to delight in the slaughter of men;
translation_text_raw: To consider this desirable would be to delight in the slaughter of men;

chinese_text: 夫樂殺人者，則不可以得志於天下矣。
translation_text: and he who delights in the slaughter of men cannot get his will in the kingdom. On occasions of festivity to be on the left hand is the prized position;
translation_text_raw: and he who delights in the slaughter of men cannot get his will in the kingdom. On occasions of festivity to be on the left hand is the prized position;

translation_text: on occasions of mourning, the right hand.
translation_text_raw: on occasions of mourning, the right hand.

translation_text: The second in command of the army has his place on the left;
translation_text_raw: The second in command of the army has his place on the left;

translation_text: the general commanding in chief has his on the right;
translation_text_raw: the general commanding in chief has his on the right;

translation_text: - his place, that is, is assigned to him as in the rites of mourning.
translation_text_raw: - his place, that is, is assigned to him as in the rites of mourning.

translation_text: He who has killed multitudes of men should weep for them with the bitterest grief;
translation_text_raw: He who has killed multitudes of men should weep for them with the bitterest grief;

translation_text: and the victor in battle has his place (rightly) according to those rites.
translation_text_raw: and the victor in battle has his place (rightly) according to those rites.
